message:
fix: Gemini adapter omits maxOutputTokens when caller doesn't specify

The adapter was always sending maxOutputTokens: 2048 as a default when
the caller didn't set MaxTokens, silently capping output. Gemini's API
accepts the field being absent, defaulting to the model's maximum.

Removed the else branch in both Complete() and Stream() paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
